name: CW Petroleum Corp
summary: CW Petroleum Corp. supplies and distributes biodiesel, biodiesel blends, ultra-low sulfur diesel, and gasoline blends to distributors and end users in the United States. It also offers freight services for fuel and chemical hauling; metered offloads/split drops; tote/drumming services; and railcar transloading services. The company was incorporated in 2005 and is based in Katy, Texas.
